top_claims: Chennai Super Kings must win their match against Sunrisers Hyderabad to have a chance at the playoffs.
This could potentially be MS Dhoni's last game at the Chepauk Stadium.
RCB became the first team to qualify for the 2026 playoffs.
MS Dhoni did not play in the match against Sunrisers Hyderabad due to injury.
Delhi Capitals beat Punjab Kings by 3 wickets.
Tilak Varma played a crucial role in Mumbai Indians' victory.
The final of IPL 2026 is scheduled for May 31.

timeline.label: IPL franchises informed about the start date change
timeline.evidence_text: The IPL had informed the franchises on December 15 2025.

timeline.label: Start of IPL 2026
timeline.evidence_text: IPL 2026 will start on March 28.

timeline.evidence_text: Yuzvendra Chahal of Punjab Kings celebrates the wicket of Mitchell Marsh.

timeline.label: Mumbai Indians vs Royal Challengers Bengaluru
timeline.evidence_text: Mumbai Indians were eliminated from the Indian Premier League (IPL) play-offs’ contention after their narrow 2-run defeat against the Royal Challengers Bengaluru at Raipur.

timeline.label: IPL 2026 match between RCB and MI
timeline.evidence_text: The incident took place during a closely fought game in Raipur, where Pandya played an excellent innings despite physical strain.

timeline.label: IPL match between CSK and LSG
timeline.evidence_text: Urvil’s stunning 13-ball half-century had catapulted Chennai to a blistering start.

timeline.label: Punjab Kings lost to Delhi Capitals
timeline.evidence_text: PBKS suffered a fourth straight defeat, this time to Delhi Capitals in Dharamshala.

timeline.label: Madhav Tiwari's performance in IPL match
timeline.evidence_text: Tiwari picked up two wickets, including those of Priyansh Arya and Cooper Connolly.

timeline.label: CSK vs LSG IPL Match
timeline.evidence_text: Lucknow Super Giants 203/8 in 20 overs (Inglis 85, Shahbaz Ahmed 43 not out; Overton 3/36) lost to Chennai Super Kings 208/5 (Urvil 65, Gaikwad 42; Shahbaz 2/30) by five wickets.

timeline.label: IPL 2026 Match 53
timeline.evidence_text: Chennai Super Kings beat Lucknow Super Giants by 5 wickets.

timeline.label: RCB vs MI match
timeline.evidence_text: RCB reached top of points table with a dramatic two-wicket victory over MI in a last-ball thriller on Sunday at the Shaheed Veer Narayan Singh International Stadium in Raipur.

timeline.label: CSK vs LSG match
timeline.evidence_text: Chennai Super Kings registered their sixth win of the season and third in a row after beating Lucknow Super Giants at home in Chennai.

timeline.label: IPL Match 54
timeline.evidence_text: Royal Challengers Bengaluru won the toss and opted to bowl first against the Mumbai Indians at the Shaheed Veer Narayan Singh International Stadium.

timeline.evidence_text: MI's playoff hopes ended with a narrow two-wicket defeat to Royal Challengers Bengaluru in Raipur.

timeline.evidence_text: Krunal Pandya’s 73 off 46 balls played a central role in RCB’s two-wicket win over Mumbai Indians.

timeline.evidence_text: DC 216/7 in 19 overs by 3 wickets.

timeline.evidence_text: who slumped to a fifth straight defeat after losing to Mumbai Indians (MI) in Dharamshala on Thursday.
